contract.name: v2/agency/toptier_code/sub_components/bureau_slug.md
contract.description: Returns federal account aggregates and totals for a specific agency sub-component in a fiscal year (observed for FY 2017-2026).

toptier_code.description: Top-tier agency code; numeric string with leading zeroes allowed.
toptier_code.constraints: Required; observed 3-digit CGAC codes succeed. Non-numeric or wrong-length values return HTML 404.

bureau_slug.description: Hyphenated, lowercase slug for the agency sub-component (case-sensitive).
bureau_slug.constraints: Required; unknown or cross-agency slugs return 200 with zero totals, while casing mismatches return HTML 404.

fiscal_year.constraints: Optional; must be an integer. FY 2017-2026 succeeded. Values above 2026 return 422; FY 2016 and earlier return HTML 500; non-integers return 400.

agency_type.description: Select awarding or funding agency aggregates.
agency_type.constraints: Optional; accepts 'awarding' (default) or 'funding'. Blank values fall back to awarding. Case-sensitive; invalid values return 400.

order.description: Sort direction for the selected field.
order.constraints: Optional; defaults to 'desc'. Accepts 'asc' or 'desc' (case-sensitive); invalid values return 400.

sort.description: Field used to order the results.
sort.constraints: Optional; defaults to 'total_budgetary_resources'. Accepts 'name', 'id', 'total_obligations', 'total_outlays', 'total_budgetary_resources'. Case-sensitive; invalid entries return 400 listing allowed values.

page.description: 1-based page index of the result set.
page.constraints: Optional; must be an integer >= 1. Pages beyond the dataset return empty results with hasNext=false; 0 or negatives return 422; non-integers return 400.

limit.description: Number of federal accounts per page.
limit.constraints: Optional; defaults to 10. Observed range is 1-100 inclusive. Values outside the range return 422; non-integers return 400.

toptier_code.description: Echoed top-tier code from the request.

bureau_slug.description: Echoed bureau slug; unknown slugs echo back with zero totals.

fiscal_year.description: Fiscal year used to generate the aggregates.

totals.description: Aggregate totals for the bureau in the requested fiscal year (zero when no data).

page_metadata.description: Pagination metadata for the result set.

total.description: Total record count across all pages.

results.description: List of federal account aggregates for the bureau.

messages.description: Warning or informational strings (empty in all observed responses).

results.name: Salaries and Expenses, Small Business Administration
Disaster Loans Program Account, Small Business Administration
Business Loans Program Account, Small Business Administration

quirks: Unknown or cross-agency bureau_slug values return HTTP 200 with zero totals/results rather than 404.
Range violations return 422 errors while type violations return 400 errors, each with a single detail string.
404 and 500 errors return HTML instead of JSON.
Blank agency_type values fall back to the default awarding view.
page_metadata.total reflects the total record count, not the number of pages.
Requests for fiscal_year <= 2016 consistently returned HTML 500 errors.
bureau_slug matching is case-sensitive; casing mistakes produce HTML 404 responses.
risks: Clients must handle HTML 404 and 500 responses despite otherwise JSON responses.
Requests for fiscal_year <= 2016 trigger HTML 500 responses, so callers need guardrails for older years.
Typos or cross-agency bureau_slug values return zeroed totals, which may mask mistakes.
The max fiscal_year constraint tracks the current year (422 when exceeded), so integrations should derive year bounds dynamically.
Slug casing mistakes produce HTML 404 responses and must be avoided.
gaps: No scenario produced a non-empty messages array, so its possible contents remain unknown.
Differences between awarding and funding agency_type responses were not observed; divergence conditions are unclear.

probes.notes: Default FY 2026 response with populated totals and pagination.

response.bodyExcerpt: {"toptier_code":"073","bureau_slug":"small-business-administration","fiscal_year":2017,"totals":{"total_obligations":2333957159.79,"total_outlays":2224647075.69,"total_budgetary_resources":3657307297.17},"page_metadata":{"page":1,"total":13,"limit":10,"next":2,"previous":null,"hasNext":true,"hasPrevious":false},"results":[{"name":"Business Loans Program Account, Small Business Administration"...

probes.notes: FY 2017 is the earliest fiscal year observed to succeed.
FY 2016 request returned HTML 500, confirming lower bound behavior.

response.bodyExcerpt:
Not Found

The requested resource was not found on this server.

probes.notes: Changing slug casing triggers HTML 404, demonstrating case sensitivity.
Valid slug paired with a different toptier returns 200 with zero totals, matching unknown-slug behavior.

mismatches: Docs list sort members as name/id/total_obligations/total_budgetary_resources, but the API also accepts total_outlays (and reports it in errors).
Docs describe the FederalAccount object without total_outlays, yet every result includes total_outlays.
Doc example path uses bureau_of_the_census (underscores); production expects bureau-of-the-census and the documented path returns 404.
gaps: No scenario produced a non-empty messages array, so its possible contents remain unknown.
Differences between awarding and funding agency_type responses were not observed; divergence conditions are unclear.
risks: Clients must handle HTML 404 and 500 responses despite otherwise JSON responses.
Requests for fiscal_year <= 2016 trigger HTML 500 responses, so callers need guardrails for older years.
Typos or cross-agency bureau_slug values return zeroed totals, which may mask mistakes.
The max fiscal_year constraint tracks the current year (422 when exceeded), so integrations should derive year bounds dynamically.
Slug casing mistakes produce HTML 404 responses and must be avoided.
